---
title: "ETO5513_T2DM_Risk-Factors"
author: "Eileen Koh"
date: "2026-04-01"
output:
  bookdown::html_document2:
    keep_md: true
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}

knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE,   warning = FALSE,
  message = FALSE)

```


```{r load_libraries}


library(knitr)
library(markdown)
library(tidyverse)
library(readxl)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(bookdown)
library(tableone)

```


```{r load}

dmdf<-read_csv("Data/diabetes_dataset.csv")
head(dmdf)
glimpse(dmdf)
summary(dmdf)


dmdf <- dmdf %>%
  mutate(diagnosed_diabetes = recode(diagnosed_diabetes, `0` = "No", `1` = "Yes"),
         family_history_diabetes= recode(family_history_diabetes, `0` = "No", `1` = "Yes"),
         hypertension_history = recode(hypertension_history, `0` = "No", `1` = "Yes"),
         cardiovascular_history = recode(cardiovascular_history , `0` = "No", `1` = "Yes"))


```
